entity.summary: Active centralized cryptocurrency exchange brand launched on September 15, 2015 through BTCChina's rebrand to BTCC, with current official materials describing United Kingdom headquarters.
entity.notes: HEI models BTCChina and BTCC as separate lineage-linked brand entities. BTCChina carries the 2011 operating origin and terminates at the September 15, 2015 rebrand; this BTCC record begins on that brand-launch date. The current United Kingdom origin follows official headquarters wording and does not imply that every regional legal provider is UK-incorporated.

events.title: BTCC brand launched through BTCChina rebrand
events.description: BTCChina launched the BTCC brand and btcc.com identity on September 15, 2015 as part of a shift toward a global audience.
events.notes: This event represents the start of the BTCC brand entity; the predecessor BTCChina record retains the service's 2011 founding history.

evidence.title: BTCC official website
evidence.notes: Official domain verifies the current BTCC identity and active exchange service.

evidence.title: CoinPaprika exchange reference for BTCC
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BTCC identity.

evidence.title: CoinGecko exchange reference for BTCC
evidence.notes: Independent exchange profile corroborates the BTCC exchange identity.

evidence.title: BTCC official company profile
evidence.notes: Official company profile supports BTCC's current operating identity and long-running service history; HEI applies the current headquarters wording only to the active BTCC record.

evidence.title: BTCChina Rebrands as BTCC with Focus on Global Audience
evidence.notes: BTCC-issued press release states that BTCChina rebranded to BTCC on September 15, 2015.
